//usr/lib64/python3.9/distutils/command/build.pyr
d!d"
buildz"build everything needed to install)
build-base=
bz base directory for build library)
build-purelib=Nz2build directory for platform-neutral distributions)
build-platlib=Nz3build directory for platform-specific distributions)
build-lib=NzWbuild directory for all distribution (defaults to either build-purelib or build-platlib)
build-scripts=Nz
build directory for scripts)
build-temp=
temporary build directoryz
plat-name=
pz6platform name to build for, if supported (default: %s))
z	compiler=
specify the compiler type)
z	parallel=
number of parallel build jobs)
debug
gz;compile extensions and libraries with debugging information)
force
fz2forcibly build everything (ignore file timestamps))
executable=
ez5specify final destination interpreter path (build.py)r
help-compilerNz
list available compilersc
